title: EL_q vs 1/sqrt(2): jackknife + bootstrap CIs (C1) and exact corpus-level adjacent-pair match fraction (C3)

C3_corpus_pooled.definition: EL_pool = sum_s (n_match_s) / sum_s (n_pairs_s)  over all 114 surahs ; cross-surah pairs NOT counted (matches paper definition extended canon-wide).

C3_corpus_flat_including_cross_surah.definition: EL_flat = matches over all consecutive verse pairs in the canonical mushaf order; INCLUDES the 113 cross-surah boundary pairs (so denominator = 6,236 - 1 = 6,235).

interpretation: C1: H0 mu = 1/sqrt(2) is RETAINED (not rejected) at alpha = 0.05 iff the jackknife and bootstrap 95 % CIs contain 1/sqrt(2). The 0.04 % numerical coincidence is well inside the sampling envelope of EL_q across the 68 Band-A surahs (per-surah sd ~ 0.20).

C3: The C3 entry's pair-level claim 'fraction == 0.5' is INCORRECT as written (verbatim corpus-pooled adjacent-pair match rate is EL_pool itself, ~ 0.71, not 0.5). The intended claim is the C1-derived corollary EL_q^2 == 0.5, tested as gap_C3_b_pool_sq.
If gap_C3_b_pool_sq is < 0.01, C1 + C3 jointly survive: pool_sq is consistent with 0.5 at the corpus level.
